tier: Tier 5.22 - Within-Polyp Per-Neuron Input Diversity Diagnostic Contract
claim: Tier 5.22 locks the within-polyp per-neuron input diversity diagnostic. Mechanism: modify update_current_injections() to give each of 8 input neurons a different sensory gain (0.3x-1.5x) and amplify per-neuron biases to 15% of sensory ceiling. Primary pass: 16-polyp PR > 2.5 AND > 1.5x baseline. Sham: shuffled neuron gain assignment. 3 outcome classes. Contract only.
caveat: Contract only; not code implementation, not scoring, not mechanism promotion, not a baseline freeze.
